welcome.subject: Welcome to Macoy's Straightening Salon!
welcome.body:
Welcome, {{name}}!

Thank you for registering at Macoy's Straightening Salon. We look forward to serving you.

Visit us at our website or book your first appointment today!

booking_confirmation.subject: Booking Confirmed — {{service}}
booking_confirmation.body:
Your Booking is Confirmed!

Hi {{name}},

Your appointment for {{service}} has been confirmed.

  • Date: {{date}}
  • Time: {{time}}
  • Stylist: {{stylist}}
  • Total: ₱{{total}}

See you soon!

booking_status_update.subject: Booking Status Update — {{bookingId}}
booking_status_update.body:
Booking Update

Hi {{name}},

Your booking {{bookingId}} status has been updated to: {{status}}.

If you have any questions, please contact us.

booking_cancelled.subject: Booking Cancelled — {{bookingId}}
booking_cancelled.body:
Booking Cancelled

Hi {{name}},

Your booking {{bookingId}} has been cancelled.

Reason: {{reason}}

We hope to see you again soon.

reminder_sms.subject: Appointment Reminder
reminder_sms.body: Hi {{name}}, reminder: You have a {{service}} appointment on {{date}} at {{time}}. See you at Macoy's Salon!

promo_email.subject: Special Offer Just for You!
promo_email.body:
Exclusive Offer

Hi {{name}},

Enjoy {{discount}} off on your next visit! Book now and treat yourself.
